name: distObjMemberBlueprint::GetAttribute
title: distObjMemberBlueprint::GetAttribute
description: Gets the value of an attribute that is set at the member blueprint.
The attribute type must correspond to the overload that is called, otherwise an error code will be returned.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Fully qualified name of the attribute.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
